description: Factorial Energy Inc. manufactures and sells solid-state batteries for the eMobility, defense, and AI/robotics markets. The company offers products, such as high-performing solid-state battery cells, and utilizes advanced manufacturing techniques, including a proprietary dry-coating process. The company was founded in 2013 and is headquartered in Billerica, Massachusetts.
mos_flag: NO — yield does not compensate for business risk
